heroHeadline: Revolution Medicines Shows Strong Phase 2 KRAS Inhibitor Results for Pancreatic Cancer at AACR 2026
heroSubtitle: From the 2018 Nobel Prize for checkpoint immunotherapy to FDA approval of the first TIL therapy and personalized mRNA cancer vaccines in Phase 3 trials — the pace of cancer treatment breakthroughs has never been faster.
footerNote: Data sourced from FDA Drug Approvals, NIH/NCI, peer-reviewed journals (NEJM, The Lancet, Nature Medicine), ASCO/ESMO conference data, and institutional analyses. All clinical data reflect published and presented trial results.
